definitions.text: ytringen som blir avgjørende i en sak
definitions.translation: the statement that becomes decisive in a matter

examples.en: the judge has the final say

examples.no: hun lot motparten få det siste ordet
examples.en: she let the other side have the last word

examples.no: det siste ordet i denne saken er ennå ikke sagt
examples.en: the last word in this case has not yet been said
